label: 霓虹夜场版
texture_guidance: 湿润街面反光、霓虹灯牌、暗木吧台、玻璃和蒸汽。
scene_prompt: NEON NIGHT DINING POSTER. light: magenta-blue neon from right side, warm table lamp from lower left, reflections on wet street or glossy counter, deep background depth. material: dark wood, wet pavement reflection, glass, metal stool, rising steam, soft haze, small neon sign shapes without readable random text. color: near black #0B0D12, neon magenta #E83E8C, cyan #1DB7C9, amber #F0A94A; keep yellow as tiny accent. composition: foreground food or drink in lower 45%, neon depth corridor behind it, title sits in top third with glowing outline but readable; leave one dark quiet zone for contrast. avoid: no daytime natural light, no red-gold festival, no two deep dark styles paired together, no unauthorized nightlife brand logos.
design_lessons: 夜场风要有深度和光源逻辑，否则会变成普通暗色海报。
